---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Rachel Austin"
date: "2026-04-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(dplyr)
library(gtsummary)
library(tidyr)
library(openxlsx)
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
```

```{r}
df <- read.xlsx("/Users/austinra/BIOS6624/Project 3/Data Processed/covariate_df.xlsx")
```

```{r}

#Claude helped create this code based on my specified table goals
# --- Define variable types ---
continuous_vars <- c("AGE", "SYSBP", "TOTCHOL", "BMI")
binary_vars     <- c("DIABETES", "BPMEDS", "CURSMOKE")
all_vars        <- c(continuous_vars, binary_vars)

# --- Reshape to long format ---
df_long <- df %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(RANDID, STROKE, TIME_STROKE),
    names_to = c(".value", "period"),
    names_pattern = "^(\\D+)(\\d)$"
  ) %>%
  mutate(period = factor(period, levels = c("1","2","3"),
                         labels = c("Period 1", "Period 2", "Period 3")))

# --- Total N per period ---
total_n <- df_long %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  summarise(total_N = sum(rowSums(!is.na(across(all_of(all_vars)))) > 0),
            .groups = "drop")

# --- Summarise continuous vars ---
cont_summary <- df_long %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(continuous_vars),
                   list(n = ~sum(!is.na(.)),
                        mean = ~mean(., na.rm = TRUE),
                        sd   = ~sd(.,   na.rm = TRUE)),
                   .names = "{.col}__{.fn}"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(-period, names_to = c("variable", "stat"), names_sep = "__") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = stat, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(summary = paste0(round(mean, 1), " (", round(sd, 1), ")"),
         n = as.integer(n)) %>%
  select(variable, period, n, summary)

# --- Summarise binary vars ---
bin_summary <- df_long %>%
  group_by(period) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(binary_vars),
                   list(n   = ~sum(!is.na(.)),
                        pct = ~round(100 * mean(., na.rm = TRUE), 1)),
                   .names = "{.col}__{.fn}"),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_longer(-period, names_to = c("variable", "stat"), names_sep = "__") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = stat, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(summary = paste0(pct, "%"),
         n = as.integer(n)) %>%
  select(variable, period, n, summary)

# --- Combine and widen by period ---
all_summary <- bind_rows(cont_summary, bin_summary) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = period,
    values_from = c(n, summary),
    names_glue  = "{period}_{.value}"
  ) %>%
  select(variable,
         `Period 1_n`, `Period 1_summary`,
         `Period 2_n`, `Period 2_summary`,
         `Period 3_n`, `Period 3_summary`)

# --- Build per-period N label for row group headers ---
n_labels <- total_n %>%
  deframe()  # named vector: "Period 1" = 1900, etc.

period1_label <- paste0("Period 1 — N = ", n_labels["Period 1"])
period2_label <- paste0("Period 2 — N = ", n_labels["Period 2"])
period3_label <- paste0("Period 3 — N = ", n_labels["Period 3"])

# --- Add a row group column based on per-variable n ---
# This inserts a "N = X / total" note per variable under each period header
all_summary <- all_summary %>%
  mutate(
    variable = recode(variable,
                      AGE       = "Age (years)",
                      SYSBP     = "Systolic BP (mmHg)",
                      TOTCHOL   = "Total Cholesterol (mg/dL)",
                      BMI       = "BMI (kg/m²)",
                      DIABETES  = "Diabetes (%)",
                      BPMEDS    = "BP Medication (%)",
                      CURSMOKE  = "Current Smoker (%)")
  )

# --- Render with gt ---
all_summary %>%
  gt() %>%
  # Spanner headers for each period (no n/N in column headers)
  cols_label(
    variable         = "Variable",
    `Period 1_n`     = "n", `Period 1_summary` = "Value",
    `Period 2_n`     = "n", `Period 2_summary` = "Value",
    `Period 3_n`     = "n", `Period 3_summary` = "Value"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md(paste0("**Period 1**<br>N = ", n_labels["Period 1"])),
    columns = c(`Period 1_n`, `Period 1_summary`)
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md(paste0("**Period 2**<br>N = ", n_labels["Period 2"])),
    columns = c(`Period 2_n`, `Period 2_summary`)
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = md(paste0("**Period 3**<br>N = ", n_labels["Period 3"])),
    columns = c(`Period 3_n`, `Period 3_summary`)
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote("n = non-missing observations for that variable. Continuous variables: Mean (SD); Binary variables: %.") %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_spanners()
  ) %>%
  opt_row_striping() %>%
  opt_table_font(font = "Calibri") %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size       = 13,
    heading.align         = "left",
    column_labels.font.weight = "bold"
  )
```
